description.zh: 互动影游 (FMV) 编辑器与运行时 · Opus/Gemini 提示词锻造 + GPT-Image 占位图 + Seedance 视频 + QTE + 剧情分支
description.en: Interactive FMV editor & player — prompt forging (Opus/Gemini), GPT-Image keyframes, Seedance video, QTE engine, branch tree

description.zh: 列出本机已存的所有剧本 (Scenario) 元数据
description.en: List metadata of all scenarios persisted on this machine

description.zh: 读取指定剧本的完整 JSON
description.en: Read full JSON of a scenario by id

description.zh: 新建/覆盖一份剧本(整本)。注意:这是整本覆盖——要增量改大纲/人物关系请优先用 reel:update-outline / reel:update-relations,别走这条把它们抹掉。本工具已加固:调用方未带的 outline/characterRelations/synopsis 会自动保留旧值。
description.en: Create or overwrite a scenario (whole-document). NOTE: this is a full overwrite — to edit the outline/relations incrementally use reel:update-outline / reel:update-relations instead. Hardened: outline/characterRelations/synopsis you omit are auto-preserved from the existing scenario.

description.zh: 读取单个场景(节点)的可编辑时间轴：分镜 shots、台词 dialogue、QTE 节奏点、音频 audio、花字 textOverlays、标记点 markers —— 每项都带 id 与时间(ms)。调用任何 reel:update-shot / reel:edit-* 前先用它拿到真实 id 与现有时间。只读,不需工作台打开。
description.en: Read one scene's editable timeline in compact form: shots, dialogue, QTE cues, audio clips, text overlays (花字) and markers — each with id and timing (ms). Call this BEFORE any reel:update-shot / reel:edit-* tool to learn real ids and current times. Read-only; workbench need not be open.

description.zh: 增量修改单个分镜的时间轴属性：变速/定格(speed,1=正常/0=定格/0.5~2=慢快放)、起止 startMs/endMs、入场转场 transitionIn、首尾动画 clipAnim。只改你给的字段。先用 reel:get-scene-timeline 拿 shotId。数据立即落盘,工作台数秒内 reload。
description.en: Incrementally patch one shot's timeline properties: speed (变速/定格; 1=normal/0=freeze/0.5~2=slow-fast), in/out timing, entrance transition (转场), clip in/out animation (首尾动画). Only provided fields change. Get shotId via reel:get-scene-timeline. Persists immediately; workbench reloads within seconds.

description.zh: 增/改/删 一条字幕台词(底栏电影字幕,DIA 轨)。op=add 建(text+startMs 必填,返回新 id);op=update 按 id 改;op=remove 按 id 删。先用 reel:get-scene-timeline 拿 id。时间为相对场景起点 ms。
description.en: Add/update/remove a subtitle dialogue line (DIA track). op=add (text+startMs required, returns new id); op=update by id; op=remove by id. Get ids via reel:get-scene-timeline. Times in ms from scene start.

description.zh: 增/改/删 一个 QTE 节奏点(限时点按)。op=add 建(shape+appearAt+targetAt 必填,返回新 id;场景没有 qte 块时自动以默认窗口/分值创建);op=update 按 id 改;op=remove 按 id 删。hold 需 durationMs,sweep 需 sweepDir。
description.en: Add/update/remove a QTE cue. op=add (shape+appearAt+targetAt required, returns new id; creates the qte block with default windows/scores if absent); op=update by id; op=remove by id. hold needs durationMs, sweep needs sweepDir.

description.zh: 增/改/删 一个花字/文字叠加(自由摆放装饰文字,TEXT 轨,区别于底栏字幕)。op=add 建(text+startMs 必填,x/y 默认画面中心,返回新 id);op=update 按 id 改;op=remove 按 id 删。x/y 归一化 0~1(0.5,0.5=中心),fontSizePct=画面高度百分比。
description.en: Add/update/remove a free text overlay (花字, TEXT track; distinct from bottom subtitles). op=add (text+startMs required, x/y default to center, returns new id); op=update by id; op=remove by id. x/y normalized 0..1 (0.5,0.5=center); fontSizePct = % of frame height.

description.zh: 增/改/删 一段音频 clip(BGM/音效/配音)。op=add 建(role+ref+startMs+durationMs 必填,ref=mediaStore 音频 id,可由 reel:list-assets 查,返回新 id);op=update 按 id 改(含 volume 0~1、淡入 fadeInMs、淡出 fadeOutMs);op=remove 按 id 删。
description.en: Add/update/remove an audio clip (BGM/SFX/voice-over). op=add (role+ref+startMs+durationMs required; ref = mediaStore audio id from reel:list-assets; returns new id); op=update by id (incl. volume 0..1, fadeInMs, fadeOutMs); op=remove by id.

description.zh: 增/命名/删 一个时间轴标记点(剪映式打点,编辑期参考锚点,不进成片)。op=add(ms 必填,label 可选,返回 id;距已有点 1ms 内返回该点);op=rename 按 id 改名;op=remove 按 id 删。ms 相对场景起点。
description.en: Add/rename/remove a timeline marker (editor reference anchor; never enters the final cut). op=add (ms required, optional label, returns id; within 1ms of an existing marker returns that one); op=rename by id; op=remove by id. ms relative to scene start.

description.zh: 一次读回剧本的叙事元信息:简介 + 大纲树(scenario.outline) + 人物关系图(scenario.characterRelations) + 角色名↔id 映射。改大纲/关系前先调它拿到现有节点/边 id 和角色名。只读,不需工作台打开。
description.en: Read a scenario's narrative meta in one shot: synopsis + outline tree + character-relations graph + a character name<->id map. Call before update-outline / update-relations to learn existing ids and reference characters by name. Read-only.

description.zh: 增量编辑剧本大纲树(scenario.outline,显示在左侧大纲面板)。优先用 upsert/removeIds 增量改(replace 会丢未列出的节点)。可顺带改 synopsis。前端轮询会把改动 reload 进工作台(要看到需打开工作台,数据无论如何都已持久化)。先用 reel:get-script-meta 取节点 id。
description.en: Incrementally edit the outline tree (scenario.outline, shown in the Outline panel). Prefer upsert/removeIds over replace. Can also set synopsis. The workbench reloads the change within seconds (open it to SEE it; data persists regardless). Call reel:get-script-meta first for node ids.

description.zh: 增量编辑人物关系图(scenario.characterRelations,显示在左侧人物关系面板)。有向边(from→to,label),双向关系=两条边以表达非对称。端点可用角色 id/名字/别名,自动解析成 id。优先 upsert/removeIds,绝不动你没碰的边。出关键帧/分镜后想补全角色关系也用它。先用 reel:get-script-meta 看角色名↔id。
description.en: Incrementally edit the character-relations graph (scenario.characterRelations, shown in the Relations panel). Directed edges (from->to, label); a bidirectional relationship = two edges (asymmetry-aware). Endpoints accept id/name/alias, auto-resolved to ids. Prefer upsert/removeIds; never wipes untouched edges. Use it to backfill relations after characters/storyboarding too. Call reel:get-script-meta for the name<->id map.

description.zh: 列出当前 .reel-assets/ 媒体库（图/视频）
description.en: List asset records in .reel-assets/ (images & videos)

description.zh: 为一个或多个场景生成视频（必须带 sceneId）。shot-aware：已分镜场(scene.shots≥2)逐镜出片送生成队列(后台并发、不挡剪辑)、各镜写 shot.videoMediaRef、Player 按 shot 切镜；未分镜则回落整场一条绑 scene.media。投递到工坊队列由工作台走浏览器内管线、刷新可接盘。工作台必须打开。提交后立即返回，进度在 forge 对话；完成后可用 reel:get-scenario 查 shot.videoMediaRef / scene.media 确认。
description.en: Generate video(s) for one or more scenes (sceneId required). Shot-aware: storyboarded scenes (scene.shots>=2) produce one clip per shot via the generation queue (concurrent background, never blocks editing), writing each shot.videoMediaRef (Player cuts between shots); un-storyboarded scenes fall back to a single whole-scene clip bound to scene.media. Enqueued to the workbench (must be open); survives reloads. Returns immediately; progress in the forge chat; confirm via reel:get-scenario.

description.zh: 查询指定 Seedance 任务状态
description.en: Get status of a Seedance video task

description.zh: 从叙事管线 (wb-narrative) 产出转入影游 Scenario，支持按里程碑增量导入（M2 三幕大纲/M3 剧情树/M4 剧本），同 runId 多次导入合并为同一本
description.en: Import a narrative pipeline run into a Reel Scenario; supports milestone-incremental import (M2 outline / M3 branch tree / M4 screenplay), merging repeated imports of the same runId into one scenario

description.zh: 提交剧本/想法给影游工坊的内置锻造管线处理（工坊会自动走 梗概→人物→大纲→剧情树 流程）
description.en: Submit script or idea to the workbench's built-in forge pipeline (auto-processes through synopsis → characters → outline → story tree)

description.zh: 把节点拆成多个镜头(分镜)并写回 scene.shots[]、在时间轴铺成可预览站位。逐节点分镜化生产的第一步——出关键帧/视频前必须先拆分镜。scope='scene'(默认,需 sceneId)拆单节点；scope='all' 整本铺底(跨场一致性)。投递到工坊队列,工作台必须打开。完成后用 reel:get-scenario 查 scene.shots 镜头数确认
description.en: Split a node into multiple shots (storyboard) → write scene.shots[] and lay them out as previewable placeholders on the timeline. The FIRST step of per-node production — required before generating keyframes/videos. scope='scene' (default, needs sceneId) splits one node; scope='all' storyboards the whole episode (cross-scene consistency). Enqueued to the workbench (must be open). Confirm via reel:get-scenario (scene.shots count)

description.zh: 一键产出一个或多个节点：拆分镜→逐镜关键帧→逐镜出片,按序跑完整条生产线。按用户原话选节点:『只生成第一个』→scope=firstN count=1;『前三个』→scope=firstN count=3;『全部』→scope=all;也可 sceneId 单个或 sceneIds 列表。多节点沿主线顺序推进保证跨节点一致性。幂等(已完成阶段/镜自动跳过)、可 stages 指定阶段、force 强制重跑。视频逐镜后台并发出片不挡剪辑,对话给节点级树状进度。逐节点产出的总指挥入口；想精细控制可单独调 generate-storyboard/keyframes/video。工作台必须打开
description.en: One-click production for one OR MORE nodes: storyboard → per-shot keyframes → per-shot video, in order. Pick nodes from the user's words: '只生成第一个/first node' -> scope=firstN count=1; '前三个/first three' -> scope=firstN count=3; '全部/all' -> scope=all; or sceneId (one) / sceneIds (list). Multiple nodes run sequentially along the mainline for cross-node consistency. Idempotent (skips done stages/shots), with optional stages subset and force re-run. Videos render per-shot in a concurrent background queue (never blocks editing); the forge chat shows a node-level tree progress. The orchestrator entry for per-node production; for fine control call generate-storyboard/keyframes/video individually. Workbench must be open

description.zh: 为某个节点逐镜各出一张关键帧(写 shot.keyframeMediaRef,keyShot 同步 scene.media),时间轴每个分镜站位显示缩略图。需先 reel:generate-storyboard 拆镜。区别于 generate-visuals(只生成人/景/物锚点)。投递到工坊队列,工作台必须打开。幂等(已有关键帧的镜默认跳过,force=true 重生)。完成后用 reel:get-scenario 查 shot.keyframeMediaRef 确认
description.en: Generate one keyframe per shot of a scene (writes shot.keyframeMediaRef; key shot syncs scene.media); each timeline shot placeholder then shows a thumbnail. Requires storyboarding first (reel:generate-storyboard). Distinct from generate-visuals (anchors only). Enqueued to the workbench (must be open). Idempotent (skip already-generated shots unless force=true). Confirm via reel:get-scenario (shot.keyframeMediaRef)

description.zh: 为当前剧本提取视觉锚点(场景/道具)并生成参考图：角色定妆照 + 场景基准图(多角度) + 关键道具图。非破坏性（不新建/替换剧本、不碰分镜关键帧）。剧本就绪后调用
description.en: Extract visual anchors (locations/props) for the active scenario and generate reference images: character turnaround sheets + location base images (multi-angle) + key prop images. Non-destructive (never recreates the scenario, never touches shot keyframes). Call after the script is ready

description.zh: 为角色生成「试镜视频 + 音色」：以每个角色的定妆照为参考，用 Seedance 生成 ~10s/3:4 单人胸像试镜视频(角色本人念白)，并把整段音轨抽成 MP3 绑为该角色音色。后续该角色镜头视频会自动用这段音色作 reference_audio,保证全剧嗓音一致。前置:角色需先有定妆照(reel:generate-visuals)。scope='all'(默认,全部有定妆照的角色,缺失才生成);scope='characters'+characterIds 指定角色;force 覆盖重生。投递工坊队列,工作台必须打开,进度见 forge 对话
description.en: Generate an audition video + voice sample per character: using each character's turnaround sheet as reference, Seedance creates a ~10s/3:4 head-and-shoulders audition video (the character speaking a line), and the full audio track is extracted to an MP3 bound as that character's voice sample. Later, that character's shot videos automatically use this sample as reference_audio for a consistent voice across the film. Prerequisite: characters must already have turnaround sheets (reel:generate-visuals). scope='all' (default; every character with a turnaround, missing-only) or scope='characters' + characterIds; force re-generates existing ones. Enqueued to the workbench (must be open); progress shows in the forge chat
